Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To stop sleeping.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: I usually wake up at 7:00 AM.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To start a machine or light.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: Please turn on the lamp.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To stop a machine or light.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: Remember to turn off the computer.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To move from standing to sitting.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: Please sit down and relax.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To move from sitting to standing.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: We had to stand up on the crowded bus.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To try to find something.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: I am looking for my keys.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To discover information.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: Did you find out when the meeting starts?

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To lift something from the ground.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: Please pick up your toys.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To dress yourself with an item of clothing.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: Put on your coat before you go out.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To remove an item of clothing.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: Take off your shoes at the door.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To return something to its owner.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: Can you give back the book I lent you?

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To return to a place.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: When will you come back from your trip?

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To leave your home to go to a social event.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: Do you want to go out tonight?

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To leave your bed.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: I get up early every morning.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To spend time relaxing with friends.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: We like to hang out at the mall.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To return a phone call.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: I will call you back in ten minutes.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To record information on paper.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: Please write down your phone number.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To complete a form with information.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: You need to fill out this application form.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To put on clothes to see if they fit.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: I want to try on these jeans.

Common Phrasal Verbs.meaning: To arrive and register at a hotel or airport.
Common Phrasal Verbs.example: What time can we check in at the hotel?
